meaning: adj.荳ｭ譁ｰ荳也噪,荳ｭ譁ｰ扈溽噪
examples: The samples are from Oligocene, Miocene and Pliocene strata.
Miocene formations (better: strata) are well-exposed in this area.
Okinawa ocean trough and Ryukyu island arc were formed in late Miocene.
It is targeting a series of stacked reservoir objectives, from the proven Miocene fairway down to the deeper Cretaceous fairway.
